title: News & Medienmitteilungen | Hirslanden
heading: News & Medienmitteilungen

sections.heading: News & Medienmitteilungen
sections.contentSummary: Page header with breadcrumb navigation and back link to 'Medien & News'. Contains H1 with page title.
Short introductory paragraph: 'Untenstehend finden Sie alle Medienmitteilungen der Hirslanden-Gruppe chronologisch geordnet.'
Small visual spacer between lead text and news list.

Dynamically filtered/paginated list of news items and press releases. 28 total results, loaded 10 at a time with a 'Mehr anzeigen' (load more) button. Items ordered chronologically descending. Each item shows: release type badge (Medienmitteilung / News), date, headline (H4), forward-arrow icon, clinic/source name.

sections.contentSummary: Large visual spacer below news list.
Two-column grid (50/50) containing a quicklink in the left column. Right column is empty. Left column contains a single quicklink tile with bookmark icon linking to the press release archive.

images.context: Load-more button icon in news list

ctas.note: JavaScript-driven pagination; loads next 10 items from data-url endpoint

templateSpecificComponents.name: filtered-content / news-list
templateSpecificComponents.description: Dynamic client-side filtered and paginated list of news items. Fetches results from a JSON/HTML endpoint (data-url). Supports page-size, hide-initial, and filter-id attributes. Each item is a linked card showing: release-type badge, date (datetime ISO attribute), H4 title, forward-arrow icon, clinic/source name. No images on list items.

templateSpecificComponents.name: generic-header with breadcrumb + back-link
templateSpecificComponents.description: Page header component that renders a multi-level breadcrumb (with expandable siblings dropdown), a back-link arrow pointing to the parent section, and the main H1 title.

templateSpecificComponents.name: lead-text
templateSpecificComponents.description: Single short introductory paragraph displayed below the header, above the main content list.

templateSpecificComponents.name: quicklink
templateSpecificComponents.description: Icon + text CTA tile. Used here to link to the press release archive. Rendered inside a 50/50 column grid.

templateSpecificComponents.name: seo-hidden-pagination
templateSpecificComponents.description: Screen-reader-only <nav> with prev/next page links for search engine crawling of paginated content. Not visible to regular users.

layoutNotes: Note: localhost:3000 returned 404 for this path (content not yet previewed in AEM). Analysis was performed against the live production site at https://www.hirslanden.ch/de/corporate/medien-und-news/medienmitteilungen-und-news.html. The page is a classic news-listing template with: (1) a generic page header with breadcrumb and back-link, (2) a short lead paragraph, (3) a dynamically loaded and paginated news list (10 items per page, 28 total at time of fetch), and (4) a bottom CTA linking to the archive. News items have NO images in the list view — only release-type badge, date, title, arrow icon, and source. The page uses a two-column grid at the bottom with only one quicklink populated. No search/filter controls are visible in the rendered HTML — filtering appears to be purely by the data-filter-id='NEWS' attribute. Language switcher offers DE/FR/EN variants.
